metadata.title:
CHAMBER OF COMMERCE PREPARES CIRCULAR
TO BE DISTRIBUTED BY BUSINESS MEN IN
THEIR CORRESPONDENCE SETTING OUT THE
UNPARALLELED ADVANTAGES OF THIS CITY

pages.raw_text:
stop OF at Spokane" is the sub
ject of a circular that the chamber
Of commerce is getting out. 1t will
be placed in the hands of all business
houses in the city with request to
enclose one in every letter written.
This plan has been decided upon as
the most effective way of advertising


Extracts from the circular follow:


Spokane is the scenic city of the
Pacific northwest, the metropolis of
the Inland Empire. and the manu-
featuring, commercial, distributing,
numbering, mining and railroad CEN
ter of the great interior Columbia
River basin.


Population, 1852.


Marvellous Growth-First settle
ment in 1873; incorporated in 1888
and now growing at the rate of 5000
annually.


Water Power-Here is found the
greatest water power in the west.
The Spokane river, flowing through
the heart of the city, descends in a
series of cascades a distance of 1872
feet within a quarter of mile.


Electric power, generated by the
falls, is transmitted to the famous
Occur dAlene silver-lead mines of
northern Idaho, a distance of over
100 miles. These mines produce a
fifth of the annual lead output of the
world, and can be easily reached via
rail or via rail and steamboat from
Spokane.


Nearby mountain lakes and rivers
TEEN with trout and are unsurpassed
for beautiful scenery. Within a
radius of IS miles from Spokane are
found scores of mountain lakes whose
scenic surroundings challenge the
world


Spokane valley, destined to be-
come one vast garden producing the
finest vegetables, apples, pears,
peaches, prunes, cherries, berries,
melons and agricultural products
known to man.


Irrigated Landslide Spokane
valley, containing 10000 acres of
rich volcanic ash soil, is rapidly be-
intensified method of soil production,
electric car line, and where a subur-
ban home becomes source of delight
and profit.


Medical Lake-One of the Won
ders of the world-a memento of the
titanic forces OF nature when the
great interior Columbia river basin
1,t, -,
eruptive volcanoes. To battle in the
waters of this lake is like rolling In
velvet. Soap is not necessary to
cleanliness by the use of Medical
lake water.
